title: Cyberpunk Samurai
description: Turns Diamond & Netherite Armor and Tools into a Cyberpunk Demon Version
body:
Optifine or EMF & ETF are required!

This Pack turns Armor and Tools into a Cyberpunk Demon Samurai Version.

Every Texture is Emissive. Following Items are modified:
- Diamond Armor
- Netherite Armor
- Diamond Tools
- Netherite Tools
- Bow
- Mace
- Trident
- Shield
